name: @prune/reward-integrity
description: F14 — Reward-Integrity Interlock. Deterministically detects reward-hacking edits — an agent weakening, disabling, or tautologizing the tests/grader it is judged against — via TypeScript AST analysis plus content-hash baselining. Structural only: no regex, no model call, no fabricated token/cost. Fail-safe: an unparseable or ambiguous edit returns `inconclusive`, never a false violation.
